recommendations.title: Chopper
recommendations.overview: The true and infamous story of Australia's notorious criminal Mark 'Chopper' Read and his years of crime, interest in violence, drugs and prostitutes.

recommendations.title: The Assassination of Jesse James by the Coward Robert Ford
recommendations.overview: Outlaw Jesse James is rumored to be the 'fastest gun in the West'. An eager recruit into James' notorious gang, Robert Ford eventually grows jealous of the famed outlaw and, when Robert and his brother sense an opportunity to kill James, their murder

recommendations.title: Killing Them Softly
recommendations.overview: Jackie Cogan is an enforcer hired to restore order after three dumb guys rob a Mob protected card game, causing the local criminal economy to collapse.

recommendations.title: Nick Cave & The Bad Seeds: One More Time with Feeling
recommendations.overview: Andrew Dominik's One More Time With Feeling is a remarkable black and white documentary which chronicles the creation of Nick Cave & The Bad Seeds' album Skeleton Tree. Originally a performance based concept, the film evolved into something much more

recommendations.title: Sly
recommendations.overview: His love of film began as an escape from a rocky childhood. From underdog to Hollywood legend, Sylvester Stallone tells his story in this documentary.

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: Shawn Mendes: In Wonder
recommendations.overview: A portrait of singer-songwriter Shawn Mendes' life, chronicling the past few years of his rise and journey.

recommendations.title: Frances
recommendations.overview: The true story of Frances Farmer's meteoric rise to fame in Hollywood and the tragic turn her life took when she was blacklisted.

recommendations.title: Capote
recommendations.overview: A biopic of writer Truman Capote and his assignment for The New Yorker to write the non-fiction book "In Cold Blood".

recommendations.title: Osama
recommendations.overview: After the rise of the Taliban in Afghanistan and the restriction of women in public life, a preteen girl is forced to masquerade as a boy in order to find work to support her mother and grandmother.
